privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for system_advisor_model_env simulate_pv_fleet_vpp task. Confirmed that the Virtual Power Plant (VPP) model is synthetically generated by the agent during the simulation. Verified the required script path, JSON output path, fleet capacity of 25.0 kW (5 x 5.0 kW), and the explicit target azimuths. Additionally verified the physical logic invariant checked by the scoring script, confirming that the south-facing azimuth (180 degrees) will produce the highest energy output in Phoenix, AZ.
